final_files.tests/final.sql:
.bail on
.read db/schema.sql
.read db/resolved_prices.sql

INSERT INTO prices(sku, amount_cents, valid_from, valid_to) VALUES
  ('cocoa', 500, '2026-07-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-07-10T00:00:00Z'),
  ('cocoa', 550, '2026-07-10T00:00:00Z', '2026-07-20T00:00:00Z'),
  ('cocoa', 600, '2026-07-20T00:00:00Z', NULL);
INSERT INTO price_requests(request_id, sku, at_time) VALUES
  ('first-edge', 'cocoa', '2026-07-10T00:00:00Z'),
  ('second-edge', 'cocoa', '2026-07-20T00:00:00Z');

CREATE TEMP TABLE assertion(ok INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(ok = 1));
INSERT INTO assertion
SELECT CASE WHEN
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resolved_prices WHERE request_id = 'first-edge') = 1
  AND (SELECT amount_cents FROM resolved_prices WHERE request_id = 'first-edge') = 550
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resolved_prices WHERE request_id = 'second-edge') = 1
  AND (SELECT amount_cents FROM resolved_prices WHERE request_id = 'second-edge') = 600
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;
